subcodes.first_line: O thou fair and delightful one! Having no time, I pen these brief lines with mine own hand, for thy distinguished services [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سفیدوش خوش و دلکش وقت ندارم مختصر بخامه خویش مینگارم زیرا از خدمات فائقه
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @business; financial; property matters
